name: Darcey & Stacey
overview: Twins Darcey and Stacey do everything together -- they got married at the same age, divorced on the same day and more. This is about to change, however, as Darcey tries to move past her toxic relationships and Stacey’s Albanian fiancé heads to America.

trailers.title: First Look: Darcey & Stacey's New Show!
